intitule: Exercise 1: Identifying Customs and Cultural Practices

enonce.texte: Look at the pictures and match each custom with the correct description.
images: People wearing traditional clothes dancing at a ceremony
People greeting each other with a handshake and a smile

questions.texte: Match the custom with the description: Traditional clothes and dancing
questions.reponse: This custom shows people wearing traditional clothes and dancing. It happens during ceremonies and celebrations.

questions.texte: Match the custom with the description: Eating traditional food with family
questions.reponse: This custom shows families eating traditional food together. It is a way to share culture and strengthen family bonds.

questions.texte: Match the custom with the description: Greeting with respect
questions.reponse: This custom shows people greeting each other. Greetings are an important part of Cameroonian culture.

enonce.texte:
Complete the sentences with the correct word from the box.

Words: traditional, ceremony, respect, greet, celebrate, culture, custom, festival

questions.texte: A ________ is a special event where people come together for a reason.
questions.reponse: A ceremony is a special event where people come together for a reason.

questions.texte: In Cameroon, we ________ our national holidays with parades and songs.
questions.reponse: In Cameroon, we celebrate our national holidays with parades and songs.

questions.texte: It is a ________ to shake hands when you meet someone older.
questions.reponse: It is a custom to shake hands when you meet someone older.

questions.texte: We should ________ our parents and grandparents.
questions.reponse: We should respect our parents and grandparents.

intitule: Exercise 3: Reading Comprehension - A Cultural Ceremony

enonce.texte:
Read the text and answer the questions.

A Traditional Wedding in Cameroon

In Cameroon, weddings are important cultural events. The bride and groom wear traditional clothes. They invite many people to the ceremony. There is a lot of dancing, singing, and food. The family and friends give gifts to the new couple. They also give advice about marriage. Everyone is happy and celebrates together. This is a beautiful tradition in many Cameroonian communities.

questions.texte: What do the bride and groom wear at a traditional wedding in Cameroon?
questions.reponse: The bride and groom wear traditional clothes.

questions.texte: What do people do at the wedding ceremony?
questions.reponse: People dance, sing, eat, and give gifts to the new couple.

questions.texte: Why is the wedding called a beautiful tradition?
questions.reponse: The wedding is called a beautiful tradition because everyone is happy and celebrates together.

intitule: Exercise 4: Grammar - Plural of Regular Nouns

enonce.texte: Write the plural form of each noun. Then use the plural noun in a sentence about customs or traditions.

questions.texte: Custom (plural)
questions.reponse: Customs. Sentence: There are many different customs in Cameroon.

questions.texte: Ceremony (plural)
questions.reponse: Ceremonies. Sentence: Traditional ceremonies are very important in our culture.

questions.texte: Tradition (plural)
questions.reponse: Traditions. Sentence: Our traditions teach us to respect our elders.

questions.texte: Celebration (plural)
questions.reponse: Celebrations. Sentence: National celebrations bring people together.

enonce.texte:
Write 4-5 sentences describing a custom or tradition in your community.

Think about: What is the custom? When does it happen? What do people do? Why is it important?

questions.texte: Describe a custom or tradition in your community. Write 4-5 sentences.
questions.reponse:
Example Answer:

In my community, we celebrate the harvest festival. This happens in November every year. People wear traditional clothes and dance. We eat special food like corn and yams. This custom is important because it thanks God for the harvest and brings the community together.

enonce.texte: Read the questions and write complete answers. Use 'I like', 'I don't like', or 'I prefer'.

questions.texte: What is your favourite traditional ceremony? Why?
questions.reponse: Example Answer: I like weddings because they are joyful. People dance and celebrate. I also like to eat the traditional food.

questions.texte: What traditional food do you like to eat during celebrations?
questions.reponse: Example Answer: I like to eat rice and chicken during celebrations. This is a special dish we eat at parties.

questions.texte: Do you prefer traditional clothes or modern clothes for ceremonies? Why?
questions.reponse: Example Answer: I prefer traditional clothes because they are colourful and beautiful. They also show our culture.

intitule: Exercise 7: Reading and Speaking - Comparing Customs

enonce.texte:
Read the text and answer the questions. Then discuss with your partner.

Different Customs in Cameroon

Cameroon has many ethnic groups. Each group has its own customs and traditions. In the North, people often wear boubous and turbans. In the South, people wear pagne and kaba. In the West, there are rich ceremonial traditions with masks and dances. Although customs are different, all groups show respect for elders and value community.
images: Map of Cameroon showing different regions and their traditional clothing
People from different ethnic groups in Cameroon wearing traditional clothes

questions.texte: What are the differences in traditional clothing in the North and South of Cameroon?
questions.reponse: In the North, people often wear boubous and turbans. In the South, people wear pagne and kaba.

questions.texte: What do all ethnic groups in Cameroon have in common?
questions.reponse: All ethnic groups show respect for elders and value community.

questions.texte: Why is it important to know about customs from different regions?
questions.reponse: It is important to know about customs from different regions because it helps us understand and respect each other. It also promotes national unity and peace.

intitule: Exercise 8: Writing a Short Story About a Custom

enonce.texte: Write a short story (6-8 sentences) about a custom or tradition in your community. Use the plural of regular nouns correctly.

questions.texte: Write a short story about a custom or tradition in your community.
questions.reponse:
Example Answer:

Every year, my community celebrates the Ngondo festival. This tradition takes place at the beach. People wear traditional clothes and sing songs. Fishermen decorate their boats. We eat fish and dance together. The celebrations last for three days. This custom brings joy and unity to our community.
